title: carex deweyana var. bolanderi
intro: Carex deweyana var. bolanderi, also known as Bolander's sedge, is a perennial grass-like plant belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Bolander's sedge include its ability to reduce inflammation, ease congestion, and soothe the throat and chest. Bolander's sedge can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to address respiratory and inflammatory conditions.
